title: How to work in retirement without seeing your Social Security checks slashed
summary: Workers claiming Social Security before full retirement age may face temporary withholdings if they continue working, but the withheld amounts are not permanently lost—they are eventually returned to the recipient.
content: Claiming benefits before full retirement age while keeping a job can trigger unexpected withholdings — but the money isn’t lost forever.

zh.title: 退休后如何继续工作而不被削减社会保障支票
zh.summary: 在达到完全退休年龄前申请社会保障的工作者如果继续工作，可能会面临临时扣款，但被扣款的金额不会永久丧失——最终会返还给受益人。

title: Need a credit-score boost? Call your credit-card company and ask for this — but proceed with caution.
summary: Requesting a credit-limit increase from your credit-card company can improve your credit score by lowering your credit utilization ratio, though borrowers should proceed cautiously to avoid increased debt temptation.
content: A credit-limit increase can help strained borrowers improve how their financial picture looks on paper.

zh.title: 需要提高信用分数？请致电您的信用卡公司并要求这个——但要谨慎行事
zh.summary: 向您的信用卡公司申请提高信用额度可以通过降低您的信用使用率来改善您的信用分数，但借款人应谨慎行事，以避免增加债务诱惑。

title: Fox to buy streaming device maker Roku for $22 billion
summary: Fox has agreed to acquire streaming device maker Roku for approximately $22 billion in enterprise value, combining its news and sports networks with a prominent streaming platform.
content: Fox, the owner of the news and sports networks, said it has reached a deal to acquire Roku for about $22 billion in enterprise value.

zh.title: 福克斯以220亿美元收购流媒体设备制造商Roku
zh.summary: 福克斯同意以约220亿美元的企业价值收购流媒体设备制造商Roku，将其新闻和体育网络与一个主要的流媒体平台相结合。

title: We're adding to our position in a consumer bank that benefits from lower oil prices
summary: An investment firm is increasing its position in a consumer bank expected to benefit from lower oil prices following geopolitical developments, reversing earlier weakness driven by credit concerns.
content: Concerns about consumer credit have weighed on this stock since the Iran war began.

zh.title: 我们加大了在一家受益于低油价的消费银行中的投资头寸
zh.summary: 一家投资公司正在增加其对一家消费银行的投资头寸，该银行预计将从地缘政治事件导致的油价下跌中受益，这是对之前因信贷担忧而造成的下跌的反转。

title: These stocks have been beating the S&P 500 and could keep the bull market going, says Morgan Stanley
summary: Morgan Stanley has identified specific stocks outperforming the S&P 500 that could sustain the current bull market, despite headwinds from peak earnings revisions and liquidity concerns.
content: The bull market for stocks has been dogged by  peak earnings revisions breadth and peak liquidity, but fear not says Morgan Stanley.

zh.title: 摩根士丹利表示：这些股票一直跑赢标普500指数，可能延续牛市
zh.summary: 摩根士丹利已识别出特定股票的表现优于标普500指数，这些股票可能维持当前牛市，尽管面临收益见顶和流动性担忧带来的逆风。

title: Fox to buy Roku streaming firm in $22bn deal
summary: Fox's $22 billion acquisition of Roku represents a strategic bet that integrating streaming technology with its established news and sports offerings will attract audiences migrating online.
content: The move is seen as a bet that combining streaming with its news and sport offering will boost Fox as TV audiences move online.

zh.title: 福克斯以220亿美元收购Roku流媒体公司
zh.summary: 福克斯以220亿美元收购Roku，该交易代表了一项战略性赌注，即将流媒体技术与其既有的新闻和体育产品整合，将吸引迁往在线的观众。

title: Strait of Hormuz traffic to return to normal as soon as August, Kalshi traders speculate
summary: Prediction market traders are assigning better-than-50% odds that shipping traffic through the Strait of Hormuz will normalize before August, following recent geopolitical developments.
content: Odds that the Strait of Hormuz traffic will return to normal before August surpassed 50%, following U.S. President Donald Trump's announcement.

zh.title: 霍尔木兹海峡交通预计8月恢复正常，Kalshi交易员推测
zh.summary: 预测市场交易员认为，在最近地缘政治事态发展之后，霍尔木兹海峡的航运交通将在8月之前恢复正常的概率超过50%。

title: Salesforce to buy AI customer service platform Fin for $3.6 billion to boost agentic offerings
summary: Salesforce is acquiring AI customer service platform Fin for $3.6 billion to expand its agentic AI capabilities as enterprises increasingly demand automated customer service solutions.
content: Businesses are accelerating their agentic offerings for enterprises as competition heats up.

zh.title: Salesforce以36亿美元收购AI客户服务平台Fin以增强其代理AI产品
zh.summary: Salesforce正在以36亿美元收购AI客户服务平台Fin，以扩展其代理AI能力，因为企业越来越需要自动化的客户服务解决方案。

title: I’m spending $170,000 to upgrade my home for my aging parents. Can I get tax breaks?
summary: A homeowner investing $170,000 in home modifications for elderly parents explores potential tax deductions, particularly for improvements that accommodate disability-related needs.
content: “Given that at least half of the remodeling cost is to accommodate my disabled mother, I’m wondering if some of this may be tax deductible.”

zh.title: 我正在花17万美元升级住宅以照顾年迈父母。我能获得税收减免吗？
zh.summary: 一位房主投资17万美元对住宅进行改造以适应年迈父母的需求，并探索潜在的税收扣减，特别是针对与残障相关改造的扣减。

title: Warsh's Fed is likely to hold rates steady — what the leadership change could mean for your money
summary: New Federal Reserve Chair Kevin Warsh is expected to hold interest rates steady at his first June meeting, with implications for consumer borrowing and savings rates going forward.
content: The Federal Reserve's June meeting, the first helmed by new Fed Chair Kevin Warsh, may impact many consumer borrowing and savings rates down the road.

zh.title: 沃什的美联储可能维持利率稳定——领导层变化对你的财务意味着什么
zh.summary: 新任美联储主席凯文·沃什预计将在6月首次会议上维持利率稳定,对消费者借贷和储蓄利率产生后续影响。

title: SpaceX gains 6% as it begins first full day of trading after record debut
summary: SpaceX rose 6% on its second day of trading following a record IPO debut, achieving a market valuation exceeding $2 trillion.
content: SpaceX is now valued at over $2 trillion after its stock rallied on the first day of trade.

zh.title: SpaceX上涨6%,创纪录IPO首日后开始首个完整交易日
zh.summary: SpaceX在创纪录IPO首日后的第二个交易日上涨6%,市场估值突破2万亿美元。

title: SpaceX IPO shines a light on the product set to disrupt Wall Street
summary: SpaceX's IPO demonstrates how perpetual futures markets provided early trading signals that closely aligned with later stock market prices, highlighting alternative venues disrupting traditional Wall Street.
content: Perp market traders had a form of early access to SpaceX, and the trading closely aligned with later prices in the stock market.

zh.title: SpaceX IPO揭示了可能颠覆华尔街的产品
zh.summary: SpaceX的IPO展示了永续期货市场如何提供与后续股票市场价格密切相符的早期交易信号,突显了颠覆传统华尔街的替代交易场所。

title: Fiserv CEO flees after presiding over 71% stock drop in his short tenure
summary: Fiserv's CEO is departing after the company's stock plummeted 71% during his brief tenure, with analysts criticizing the company's lack of strategic direction.
content: The financial-services company “continues to look strategically adrift,” an analyst says, as the stock falls further.

zh.title: Fiserv首席执行官因任期内股价暴跌71%而离职
zh.summary: Fiserv首席执行官因公司股价在其短期任职期间暴跌71%而即将离职，分析师批评该公司缺乏战略方向。

title: Oil prices retreat to $80 a barrel after U.S. and Iran agree to a framework for peace
summary: Oil prices retreated to $80 per barrel following a U.S.-Iran peace agreement framework, pushing U.S. gasoline prices below $4 per gallon on a national average basis.
content: U.S. gas prices dipped below $4 a gallon on Monday, based on GasBuddy’s national average.

zh.title: 美国与伊朗同意和平框架后油价回落至80美元/桶
zh.summary: 在美国与伊朗达成和平协议框架后，油价回落至每桶80美元，推动美国汽油价格在全国平均水平上跌破每加仑4美元。

title: KFC leans into boneless chicken, new drinks as chain tries to regain market share
summary: KFC is introducing boneless chicken options and new beverages to compete for market share amid intense competition in the rapidly growing global chicken market.
content: KFC is facing more competition from legacy giants and upstarts alike, thanks to the growing global popularity of chicken.

zh.title: 肯德基推出无骨鸡和新饮品以重振市场份额
zh.summary: 肯德基推出无骨鸡选项和新饮品，以在全球快速增长的鸡肉市场中竞争和夺回市场份额。

title: UK to ban social media for under-16s to 'give kids their childhood back'
summary: The UK is planning to ban social media access for under-16s to protect childhood development. The ban would encompass major platforms including TikTok, Instagram, Facebook, YouTube, Snapchat, and X.
content: The ban could include platforms like Snapchat, TikTok, YouTube, Instagram, Facebook and X.

zh.title: 英国禁止16岁以下未成年人使用社交媒体以'让孩子重拾童年'
zh.summary: 英国计划禁止16岁以下的未成年人访问社交媒体以保护儿童发展。该禁令将涵盖包括抖音、Instagram、Facebook、YouTube、Snapchat和X在内的主要平台。

title: SoftBank surges more than 10% as Iran-U.S. deal sends Asia tech stocks soaring
summary: SoftBank shares surged over 10% as an Iran-U.S. peace deal sparked a broader rally in Asian tech stocks. The agreement signals potential relief for market volatility and investor sentiment.
content: Asian tech stocks surged Monday on news that Iran and the U.S. have reached a deal.

zh.title: 伊朗-美国协议激发亚洲科技股飙升，软银股价涨幅超10%
zh.summary: 伊朗-美国和平协议引发亚洲科技股广泛上涨，软银股价涨幅超过10%。该协议预示市场波动和投资者信心可能会缓解。

title: Trump says France must scrap tech 'sales tax' or face 100% wine tariffs: NY Post
summary: President Trump threatened 100% tariffs on French wine if France doesn't eliminate its digital services tax ahead of the G7 summit. The ultimatum signals escalating trade tensions between the U.S. and France.
content: President Donald Trump issued the threat ahead of this week's G7 summit in Évian-les-Bains, France.

zh.title: 特朗普称法国必须取消科技'销售税'，否则将面临100%葡萄酒关税
zh.summary: 特朗普总统威胁说，如果法国不在七国集团峰会前取消数字服务税，将对法国葡萄酒征收100%的关税。这一最后通牒表明美国和法国之间贸易紧张局势升级。

title: CNBC Daily Open: Iran deal fuels global relief rally
summary: An Iran peace deal has triggered a global stock market rally as investors anticipate relief from the energy crisis. The agreement offers hope for easing economic pressures linked to conflict-driven commodity volatility.
content: Iran peace deal sparks a global relief rally in stocks amid hopes that the end of the war will ease the energy crisis impacting economies worldwide.

zh.title: CNBC每日开盘：伊朗协议推动全球救济性反弹
zh.summary: 伊朗和平协议引发全球股市反弹，因为投资者期待能源危机得到缓解。该协议为缓解与冲突驱动的商品波动相关的经济压力带来了希望。

title: Demand at baby bank 'has never been higher'
summary: A baby bank reports unprecedented demand as rising childcare costs force working families to seek financial assistance. The crisis highlights the affordability challenges facing parents across income levels.
content: The founder says rising childcare costs mean many of those they help are in work but struggling.

zh.title: 婴幼儿银行的需求"前所未有地高"
zh.summary: 随着托儿成本上升，工薪家庭被迫寻求财务援助，婴幼儿银行报告需求空前高涨。这场危机凸显了各收入水平的父母面临的承受能力挑战。

title: SpaceX: To the moon for investors or a bumpy ride? Here's what experts say
summary: SpaceX shares show early optimism from investors following the company's market debut. Experts debate whether the stock's initial performance signals sustained upside or faces headwinds ahead.
content: If the first day's share price is anything to go by, investors are still very optimistic on the stock.

zh.title: SpaceX：投资者的月球梦还是坎坷之路？专家怎么说
zh.summary: 在公司上市后，SpaceX股票显示出投资者的早期乐观情绪。专家们争论该股票的初期表现是否预示着持续上升还是面临未来阻力。

title: Markets cheer U.S.-Iran agreement, but some investors caution deal is yet to be signed
summary: Asian stocks rallied and oil prices fell Monday after the U.S. and Iran agreed to a peace deal to end nearly four months of conflict. Some investors urge caution as the agreement has not yet been formally signed.
content: Asian stocks rallied Monday while oil prices tumbled after the U.S. and Iran agreed to a peace deal aimed at ending nearly four months of conflict.

zh.title: 市场对美伊协议欢呼雀跃，但部分投资者警告交易尚未签署
zh.summary: 美国和伊朗同意达成和平协议以结束近四个月冲突后，亚洲股市周一上涨，油价下跌。部分投资者敦促谨慎，因为该协议尚未正式签署。

title: World leaders welcome U.S.-Iran deal as Europe signals sanctions relief, urges Hormuz reopening
summary: The United States and Iran have reached an agreement following more than three months of negotiations and military conflict that began in late February. The deal has prompted responses from world leaders and Europe, with sanctions relief being discussed. This resolution is significant as the months-long hostilities had disrupted global energy and commodities markets.
content: The agreement came after more than three months of stop-start negotiations and bouts of fighting since late February, roiling global energy and commodities markets.

zh.title: 世界领导人欢迎美伊协议，欧洲暗示解除制裁并敦促霍尔木兹海峡重新开放
zh.summary: 美国和伊朗在经过三个多月的谈判和从2月底开始的军事冲突后达成协议。该协议引发了世界领导人和欧洲的回应，并讨论了制裁解除问题。这一解决方案意义重大，因为数月的敌对行动扰乱了全球能源和商品市场。

title: Oil prices slide after Pakistan announces deal between US and Iran
summary: Oil prices have declined following an announcement of a peace agreement between the United States and Iran, which includes reopening the key Strait of Hormuz waterway. The deal, announced by U.S. President Donald Trump, brings relief to global energy markets that had been disrupted by the conflict.
content: Under the agreement, the key Strait of Hormuz waterway will be reopened, US President Donald Trump said.

zh.title: 巴基斯坦宣布美伊协议后油价下滑
zh.summary: 在美伊和平协议宣布后油价下跌，该协议包括重新开放关键的霍尔木兹海峡水道。由美国总统特朗普宣布的该协议为因冲突而受扰乱的全球能源市场带来了缓解。

title: Stock futures jump, oil prices fall as Trump says U.S. has reached peace deal with Iran
summary: President Donald Trump announced that the United States has reached a peace deal with Iran, ending months of hostilities that had shut the Strait of Hormuz and triggered a global oil shock. The announcement prompted stock-index futures to surge while oil prices fell, signaling market optimism about economic recovery.
content: Oil prices fell and U.S. stock-index futures jumped Sunday after President Donald Trump said the U.S. has agreed to a peace deal with Iran, apparently ending months of hostilities that shut the Strait of Hormuz and sent the global economy into an oil shock.

zh.title: 特朗普宣布与伊朗达成和平协议，股指期货上升油价下跌
zh.summary: 特朗普总统宣布美国与伊朗达成和平协议，结束了数月的敌对行动，这些行动导致霍尔木兹海峡关闭并引发全球油价冲击。该宣布促使股指期货飙升，油价下跌，表明市场对经济复苏的乐观情绪。

title: Stock futures jump after the U.S. and Iran reach a deal to end the war: Live updates
summary: The United States and Iran have reached an agreement to end their ongoing conflict. This development comes as the three major U.S. stock indexes are posting gains following a winning week.
content: The three major indexes are coming off a winning week.

zh.title: 美伊达成结束战争协议后股指期货上涨：实时更新
zh.summary: 美国和伊朗已达成协议结束其持续的冲突。在经过成功的一周后，三大美股指数正在上涨。
